subject: Whis, the Universe 7 angel attendant, in a calm stance wearing angelic robes with a staff
description: A slender humanoid figure stands in a composed and upright posture. The figure has light-toned skin, a distinctive rounded-top headdress, and wears long layered robes with a blue-purple and white color scheme. A long staff is visible held at the figure's side. The expression is serene and untroubled. The background is a dark void with subtle light gradients, emphasizing the figure's calm detachment from conflict. The card text confirms the character as a divine guardian-class attendant.
foreground: robed humanoid figure with headdress and staff in a calm stance
background: dark void with subtle light gradient
